mcp_tools.name: start_committee_session
mcp_tools.description: Start a new committee discussion session with multiple LLM participants.

mcp_tools.name: get_session_status
mcp_tools.description: Query the current status and progress of a committee discussion session.

mcp_tools.name: read_discussion
mcp_tools.description: Retrieve full discussion history with all opinions from participants.

mcp_tools.name: synthesize_discussion
mcp_tools.description: Generate AI-powered synthesis and consensus analysis from the discussion.
